title: BG Electrical Large Cooker Control Switch Unit with LED Power Indicator, Double Plate, Double Pole, Raised Profile, Round Edges, Nexus Metal, Brushed Steel, 45A, NBS72
features: SLEEK AND SLIM LARGE COOKER SWITCH WITH LED POWER INDICATOR: This large 45A cooker control switch (86mmx146mm) has a brushed steel finish and power indicator. Double pole switching and twin Earth ensure a safer installation
PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, and a slim profile – combining quality with modern elegance
COLOUR CODED CAPTIVE SCREW TERMINALS: Makes it incredibly easy to install and to connect the wires. Fits a 47mm back box, ideal for retrofit
FIXED INTEGRATED PLASTIC GASKET TO PROTECT METAL EDGES FROM MOISTURE: With no visible plastic to be seen around the switch
BG ELECTRICAL IS PART OF LUCECO PLC: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
